quicksight.dataset.columntag.CfnAbout: A tag for a column in a ` [TagColumnOperation](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/quicksight/latest/APIReference/API_TagColumnOperation.html) ` structure. This is a variant type structure. For this structure to be valid, only one of the attributes can be non-null.

quicksight.dataset.columntag.ColumnGeogr.Description: A geospatial role for a column.
quicksight.dataset.columntag.ColumnGeogr.Allowed values: CITY | COUNTRY | COUNTY | LATITUDE | LONGITUDE | POSTCODE | STATE
